name: obsidian-fsrs-plugin
description: Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler integration. Implements FSRS algorithm for spaced repetition flashcards directly in your notes.

scripts.build-wasm: wasm-pack build wasm-lib --target web --out-dir pkg --out-name wasm_lib
scripts.wasm: npm run build-wasm && npm run encode-wasm
scripts.dev: nodemon --watch wasm-lib/src --ext rs --exec "npm run wasm && node esbuild.config.mjs"
scripts.build: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && npm run wasm && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
